entries.title: Deep Learning Portfolio Risk Engine
entries.description: End-to-end system that uses LSTM networks and Monte Carlo simulation to estimate VaR and CVaR across multi-asset portfolios in real-time, with an interactive Streamlit dashboard for scenario analysis.

entries.title: Macro-Economic Time Series Forecaster
entries.description: Hybrid forecasting framework combining ARIMA, Facebook Prophet, and Transformer-based models to forecast CPI, GDP growth, and yield curves with automatic model selection and uncertainty quantification.

entries.title: Smart Portfolio Optimiser
entries.description: Multi-objective optimisation engine supporting mean-variance, risk parity, Black-Litterman, and hierarchical risk parity (HRP) strategies - with constraint handling for real-world mandates and live rebalancing triggers.

entries.title: NLP Earnings Sentiment Signal
entries.description: NLP pipeline that extracts sentiment and topic signals from 10-K filings and earnings call transcripts using FinBERT and LDA topic models, integrated as alpha factors into a cross-sectional equity return model.

entries.title: Systematic Backtesting Framework
entries.description: Event-driven backtesting platform supporting equities and crypto, with transaction cost modelling, realistic slippage simulation, performance attribution, and Sharpe/Sortino/Calmar benchmarking reports.

entries.title: Alternative Data Analytics Pipeline
entries.description: Automated ingestion and feature-engineering pipeline for alternative datasets (satellite imagery signals, social sentiment, web-scraped pricing data), feeding downstream ML models for systematic alpha generation.
